tldr_zh: Meta推出Muse圖像生成模型，Anthropic開放Claude Cowork行動版，OpenAI企業客戶擴展中；美國對伊朗展開軍事回應。
tldr_en: Meta launches Muse image generator, Anthropic expands Claude Cowork to mobile, OpenAI enterprise adoption grows; US retaliates against Iran militarily.

items.title_zh: Meta推出Muse圖像生成模型，支援跨應用整合
items.title_en: Meta Launches Muse Image Generation Model Across Apps
items.summary_zh: Meta推出由Superintelligence Labs開發的Muse Image模型，已在Meta AI應用、Instagram和WhatsApp上線，未來將擴展至Facebook和Messenger。該模型支援在AI生成圖片中整合其他Instagram用戶內容，適用於廣告、裝飾和創作等多個場景。
items.summary_en: Meta unveiled its Muse Image model from Superintelligence Labs, now powering image generation across Meta AI, Instagram, and WhatsApp with Facebook and Messenger coming soon. The model enables integration of other Instagram users into AI-generated photos, supporting advertising, decoration, and creator opportunities.

items.title_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Cowork行動版，擴大存取管道
items.title_en: Anthropic Expands Claude Cowork to Mobile and Web
items.summary_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Cowork在行動設備和網頁版本，原先僅限macOS和Windows桌面應用。新版本首先向Max訂閱用戶開放，其他計劃用戶將在未來幾週內逐步獲得存取權限，進一步降低使用門檻。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launched Claude Cowork on mobile and web, expanding beyond the desktop-only macOS and Windows versions. Max subscribers get first access, with rollout to other plan users coming in the following weeks, significantly lowering the barrier to adoption.

items.title_zh: OpenAI企業客戶成功案例增加，日本銀行MUFG采用
items.title_en: OpenAI Enterprise Adoption Accelerates with MUFG, Australian Payments Plus
items.summary_zh: 日本三菱日聯金融集團（MUFG）採用ChatGPT Enterprise建立AI原生組織，改善工作流程並提供新型AI金融服務。澳洲支付公司Australian Payments Plus使用ChatGPT Enterprise和Codex加快支付流程，提升品質且保持人工判斷中心角色。
items.summary_en: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to become AI-native, improving workflows and delivering new AI-powered financial services at scale. Australian Payments Plus leverages ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to accelerate payment processing, improve quality, and maintain human judgment as central.

items.title_zh: 微軟削減AI開支，加大自有模型投入力度
items.title_en: Microsoft Joins AI Cost-Cutting Trend, Increases In-House Model Focus
items.summary_zh: 微軟加入業界削減AI成本的趨勢，減少對外部模型的依賴，轉向更多使用自家開發的模型。這反映出科技巨頭在AI成本快速上升的背景下，尋求提升成本效益的策略調整。
items.summary_en: Microsoft joins Silicon Valley giants in cutting AI spending by relying more heavily on in-house models rather than third-party solutions. This reflects the industry-wide shift toward cost efficiency amid rapidly escalating AI infrastructure expenses.

items.title_zh: Google Pixel 11發表會確定8月12日召開，傳聞將漲價
items.title_en: Google Confirms Pixel 11 Launch Event for August 12 with Possible Price Increases
items.summary_zh: Google確認將於8月12日召開Pixel 11發表會。新手機據傳配備發光LED功能，並可能面臨價格調升。此次發表會成為科技業界重點關注的活動。
items.summary_en: Google confirmed the Pixel 11 launch event for August 12. New phones reportedly feature glowing LEDs and higher price tags are expected. The event marks a significant tech industry milestone.

items.title_zh: Meta智慧眼鏡隱私功能升級，防止使用者修改隱私燈
items.title_en: Meta Updates Smart Glasses to Disable Camera if Privacy Light Is Tampered
items.summary_zh: Meta宣布將更新智慧眼鏡，新增功能在偵測隱私LED燈遭破壞時自動關閉相機。此舉回應公眾對隱私的擔憂，對抗修改硬體的破解行為。
items.summary_en: Meta announced an update to disable the camera if the privacy LED light is tampered with or destroyed. The move addresses public privacy concerns and counters modders attempting to modify the hardware.

items.title_zh: Netflix與數位媒體品牌合作，引入短影片內容
items.title_en: Netflix Partners with Digital Publishers Including BuzzFeed and Condé Nast for Short-Form Video
items.summary_zh: Netflix自8月3日起將與BuzzFeed、康泰納仕、赫斯特雜誌等數十家數位媒體品牌合作，推出2至20分鐘的短影片內容。此策略涵蓋過去授權內容和新製作系列，原本將於YouTube等平台發布。
items.summary_en: Starting August 3rd, Netflix will feature 2 to 20-minute videos from dozens of digital media brands including BuzzFeed, Condé Nast, Hearst Magazines, People Inc, and Tastemade. The deal includes both licensed past content and new ongoing series previously destined for YouTube.

items.title_zh: 德州應用商店法律生效，大科技公司面臨新規管
items.title_en: Texas App Store Age Verification Law Upheld by Supreme Court
items.summary_zh: 美國最高法院允許德州的應用商店年齡驗證法繼續執行，儘管科技大廠批評此法為「審查制度」。德州在第五巡迴法院勝訴，該法要求應用商店實施年齡驗證機制。
items.summary_en: The Supreme Court let Texas enforce its age verification law for app stores, despite Big Tech's "censorship regime" claims. Texas won at the 5th Circuit, requiring app stores to implement age verification mechanisms.

items.title_zh: Rust首進TIOBE前十，記憶體安全推動人氣上升
items.title_en: Rust Enters TIOBE Top 10 as Memory Safety Drives Programming Language Adoption
items.summary_zh: 根據TIOBE 2026年7月程式語言排行，Rust首次進入前十名，排名第10，評分1.34%，較去年同期第18名大幅上升。TIOBE指出Rust因重視記憶體安全且效能優異，成為C和C++之外的系統程式設計語言選擇。
items.summary_en: Rust entered the TIOBE Top 10 for the first time in July 2026, ranking 10th with a 1.34% score, up from 18th place year-over-year. TIOBE attributes the surge to Rust's focus on memory safety while maintaining high performance, making it a compelling alternative to C and C++.

items.title_zh: Apple隱私郵件功能現漏洞，真實地址可能被揭露
items.title_en: Apple's Hide My Email Feature Vulnerable to Privacy Breach, Real Address Exposure Possible
items.summary_zh: 資安研究人員揭露Apple「Hide My Email」功能存在漏洞，攻擊者可透過匿名別名取得原本隱藏的真實信箱地址。Apple曾聲稱已於3月和6月修補，但研究人員發現問題仍未解決，決定公開此漏洞以提醒用戶。
items.summary_en: Security researchers disclosed a privacy vulnerability in Apple's Hide My Email feature that allows attackers to obtain the hidden real email address through generated aliases. Despite Apple's claims of fixes in March and June, the issue persists, prompting public disclosure to alert users.

items.title_zh: 美軍對伊朗展開軍事打擊，回應荷莫茲海峽商船遭襲
items.title_en: US Conducts Military Strikes Against Iran Following Attacks on Strait of Hormuz Tankers
items.summary_zh: 美國中央司令部表示已對伊朗展開一系列強力打擊，回應伊朗近期攻擊航經荷莫茲海峽的三艘商船事件。美國並撤銷對伊朗石油的臨時制裁豁免。伊朗警告將採取「決定性措施」進行回應。
items.summary_en: The US Central Command conducted military strikes against Iran in response to recent attacks on three commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. The US revoked temporary sanctions exemptions on Iranian oil. Iran warned it would "take decisive measures" in response.

items.title_zh: 法國極右翼領袖雷朋宣布參加2027年大選，上訴貪汙罪名
items.title_en: French Far-Right Leader Marine Le Pen Announces 2027 Presidential Run, Appeals Conviction
items.summary_zh: 法國極右翼國民聯盟領導人雷朋宣布參加2027年總統大選，並就涉嫌挪用公款罪名向最高法院提起上訴。法院已裁定她可參選但須戴監控項圈一年。民調顯示極右翼在明年大選第一輪投票將領先。
items.summary_en: French far-right National Rally leader Marine Le Pen announced her candidacy for the 2027 presidential election and appealed her conviction. Courts ruled she could run but must wear a monitoring tag for a year. Polls show the far-right leading in the first round of voting.

items.title_zh: 美議員警告：無台灣晶片將面臨經濟危機，須因應中國灰色戰術
items.title_en: US Congressman Warns Taiwan Chip Shortage Could Trigger Economic Crisis Worse Than Great Depression
items.summary_zh: 美國眾議員文德曼表示，先進晶片產地未來仍距中國近，若美國無法取得台灣晶片將面臨經濟大蕭條後最嚴重的經濟危機。他呼籲美國及盟國必須因應中國對台灣的灰色地帶戰術。
items.summary_en: US Congressman emphasizes that advanced chip production remains dangerously close to China, warning that losing Taiwan chip access would trigger the worst economic crisis since the Great Depression. He urges the US and allies to counter China's gray-zone tactics against Taiwan.
